PAALER Better mat · Better floor
Scraper & Dirt Control Matting · 刮砂除尘地垫

Akon™

The distinctive pineapple-texture surface features clearly defined patterns and a firm structure that resists deformation under heavy foot traffic.

独特的菠萝纹表面设计，纹路清晰、结构坚固，在高密度人流踩踏下不易变形。有效刮除鞋底泥沙污垢，保持入口区域洁净。

01

Heavier Construction

更重的构造

Akon weighs 1700g/m² compared to 1000g/m² for typical products. The heavier construction significantly improves stability and durability, helping the mat stay firmly in place even under heavy foot traffic.

艾肯重量达1700g/m²，远超普通产品的1000g/m²。更重的构造显著提升了稳定性和耐用性，即使在高密度人流下，地垫也能牢固地固定在原位。

1700 g/m²
Akon
+70%
1000 g/m²
Typical
普通产品
Dense loop pile construction — close-up view
密实圈绒结构 — 微距特写
02

Higher Pile Height

更高的绒毛高度

Akon features a 9mm pile height — significantly taller than typical mats. The increased pile height creates deeper channels that trap more sand and grit, enhancing dirt removal performance dramatically.

艾肯拥有9mm绒毛高度，远高于普通地垫。更高的绒毛形成更深的沟槽，能捕获更多泥沙污垢，大幅提升除尘刮砂效果。

9 mm
Pile Height
绒毛高度
11 mm
Total Height
总高度
Akon
9mm
Precision caliper measurement of pile height
游标卡尺精确测量绒毛高度
03

Denser Pile Structure

更密实的绒毛结构

After 2 years of use, Akon's surface remains unchanged — fibers stay full and dense. Typical products become worn and flattened over time, losing their scraping effectiveness. Drag the slider to compare.

使用两年后，艾肯表面依然如新——纤维保持饱满致密。而普通产品已磨损扁平，逐渐失去刮砂功能。拖动滑块对比效果。

2+ yrs
Durability
耐用年限

04

Fiber Arrangement

纤维排列工艺

Densely arranged fibers resist flattening under heavy foot traffic. The tightly packed pile structure provides stronger resilience and maintains effective scraping performance over the life of the mat.

密集排列的纤维抵抗高强度踩踏压平。紧密的绒毛结构提供更强的回弹力，在地垫整个使用寿命中持续保持有效的刮砂性能。

4000 g/m²
Total Weight
总重量
Tightly packed fiber loops resist flattening
紧密排列的纤维圈绒抵抗压平

Care · 清洁维护
Easy Maintenance
简便的清洁维护

Daily Cleaning

日常清洁

Use an upright vacuum cleaner with a brush attachment for regular maintenance.

使用带刷头的立式吸尘器进行日常清洁。

Deep Cleaning

深度清洁

Use a carpet extractor or pressure washer with a low-foam carpet cleaner. Rinse thoroughly and remove excess moisture using a wet vacuum or air drying.

使用地毯抽洗机或高压清洗机配合低泡地毯清洁剂。彻底冲洗后用吸水机或自然风干去除多余水分。
